data.title: REG - GCP Infra Inv Ltd - Transaction in Own Shares
data.description:
RNS Number : 7956D GCP Infrastructure Investments Ltd 04 April 2025  

4 April 2025

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited

(the "Company" or "GCP Infra")

LEI: 213800W64MNATSIV5Z47

Transaction in own shares

GCP Infra today announces that pursuant to the general authority granted by shareholders of the Company at the annual general meeting on 13 February 2025 to make market purchases of its own ordinary shares, it repurchased 277,576 ordinary shares at a weighted average price of 70.74 pence per share, to be held in treasury, on 4 April 2025.

Following this transaction, the Company has in issue 884,797,669 ordinary shares of which 32,802,688 are held in treasury.

For reporting purposes under the FCA's Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules the market should exclude any shares held in treasury and should use the figure of 851,994,981 voting rights when determining if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in the Company.

For further information, please contact:

Gravis Capital Management Limited

Philip Kent

Cameron Gardner

Max Gilbert

+44 (0)20 3405 8500

RBC Capital Markets

Matthew Coakes

Elizabeth Evans

+44 (0)20 7653 4000

Stifel Nicolaus Europe Limited

Edward Gibson-Watt

Jonathan Wilkes-Green

+44 (0)20 7710 7600

Burson Buchanan

Helen Tarbet

Samuel Adams

Henry Wilson

+44 (0)20 7466 5000

Notes to Editors

GCP Infra is a closed-ended investment company and FTSE-250 constituent whose shares are traded on the main market of the London Stock Exchange. Its objective is to provide shareholders with regular, sustained, long-term distributions and to preserve capital over the long term by generating exposure to UK infrastructure debt and related and/or similar assets.

The Company primarily targets investments in infrastructure projects with long term, public sector-backed, availability-based revenues. Where possible, investments are structured to benefit from partial inflation protection. GCP Infra is advised by Gravis Capital Management Limited.

GCP Infra has been awarded with the London Stock Exchange's Green Economy Mark in recognition of its contribution to positive environmental outcomes.

This information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. RNS is approved by the Financial Conduct Authority to act as a Primary Information Provider in the United Kingdom. Terms and conditions relating to the use and distribution of this information may apply. For further information, please contact rns@lseg.com or visit www.rns.com.

RNS may use your IP address to confirm compliance with the terms and conditions, to analyse how you engage with the information contained in this communication, and to share such analysis on an anonymised basis with others as part of our commercial services. For further information about how RNS and the London Stock Exchange use the personal data you provide us, please see our Privacy Policy.  END  POSPKQBDABKDNQK

data.title: REG - Murray Inc Trust PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
data.description:
RNS Number : 7999D Murray Income Trust PLC 04 April 2025  

MURRAY INCOME TRUST PLC ("the Company")

Legal Entity Identifier (LEI):  549300IRNFGVQIQHUI13

PURCHASE OF OWN ORDINARY SHARES

On 4 April 2025, the Company purchased in the market 25,000 Ordinary shares at a price of 782.0 pence per share. These shares will be held in treasury.

Following the transaction, the Company's share capital comprises:

98,013,980 Issued Ordinary shares (excluding treasury shares)

21,515,552 Ordinary shares held in treasury

119,529,532 Issued Ordinary shares (including treasury shares)

The total number of shares with voting rights in the Company is 98,013,980 and this figure may be used by shareholders as the denominator for the calculations by which they will determine if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in, the Company under the Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

For further information, please contact:

Stuart Reid

abrdn Holdings Limited

Secretaries

Tel. 0131 372 9369

This information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. RNS is approved by the Financial Conduct Authority to act as a Primary Information Provider in the United Kingdom. Terms and conditions relating to the use and distribution of this information may apply. For further information, please contact rns@lseg.com or visit www.rns.com.

RNS may use your IP address to confirm compliance with the terms and conditions, to analyse how you engage with the information contained in this communication, and to share such analysis on an anonymised basis with others as part of our commercial services. For further information about how RNS and the London Stock Exchange use the personal data you provide us, please see our Privacy Policy.  END  POSQZLFBEZLFBBZ

data.title: Tsakos Energy Navigation Down Over 14%, on Pace for Lowest Close Since August 2022Data Talk
data.description:
Tsakos Energy Navigation Limited ( TEN ) is currently at $13.84, down $2.34 or 14.46%

  • Would be lowest close since Aug. 10, 2022, when it closed at $13.54
  • On pace for largest percent decrease since March 16, 2023, when it fell 17.57%
  • Currently down two consecutive days; down 19.3% over this period
  • Worst two day stretch since the two days ending March 16, 2023, when it fell 21.87%
  • Down 20.18% year-to-date
  • Down 92.88% from its all-time closing high of $194.50 on Dec. 7, 2007
  • Down 47.54% from 52 weeks ago (April 5, 2024), when it closed at $26.38
  • Down 55.9% from its 52-week closing high of $31.38 on June 5, 2024
  • Would be a new 52-week closing low
  • Traded as low as $13.72; lowest intraday level since Aug. 15, 2022, when it hit $13.46
  • Down 15.2% at today's intraday low; largest intraday percent decrease since March 16, 2023, when it fell as much as 19.4%

All data as of 12:13:58 PM ET

Source: Dow Jones Market Data, FactSet

data.title: European Brewing Association Seeks Clarity on New US Tariffs on Aluminum Cans
data.description:
The Brewers of Europe said Thursday it is seeking more clarity on the exact products covered by a new US regulation imposing tariffs on imported aluminum derivatives, specifically beer and empty aluminum cans.

The Belgium-based group represents brewing companies such as Heineken , , Carlsberg (CARL-A.CO, CARL-B.CO) and Anheuser-Busch InBev (, ANH.JO), as well as other national brewers associations across the European Union.

data.title: Rakuten Browser Extension False Advertising - Levi & Korsinsky, LLP Launches Investigation
data.description:
NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / April 4, 2025 / Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of consumer who used Rakuten's browser extension for shopping online products or services. Levi &Korsinsky, LLP's investigation indicates that Rakuten is alleged to have falsely represented that they will find users the best deals and coupons on online products or services by using the Rakuten Browser Extension, but in fact, only presented users with deals and coupon codes as pre-approved by businesses.

WHAT'S THIS ABOUT?

If you used Rakuten's browser extension, you may be entitled to compensation for Rakuten's false representations. Take a stand and claim what's rightfully yours. Rakuten is accused of falsely claiming they are searching the internet and finding the best possible deals for its users, but in reality, is only allowing users to apply pre-approved coupon codes Rakuten has negotiated directly with the business.

AM I ENTITLED TO COMPENSATION?

If you are a consumer who uses Rakuten's extension, you may be entitled to compensation for Rakuten's false representations. Rakuten is alleged to have falsely represented that they will find users the best deals and coupons on online products or services by using the Rakuten Browser Extension.

HOW DO I KNOW IF I WAS AFFECTED?

If you used Rakuten's browser extension for shopping online products or services, follow the link below for additional information and to stand with us against unfair internet business practices.

Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating whether affected consumers are entitled to compensation. There is no cost to participate. Follow the link below to find out:

https://tinyurl.com/2sxzfuta

data.title: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP Investigates Wine Spectator VPPA Violation
data.description:
NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / April 4, 2025 / Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of individuals who subscribed to Wine Spectator website at https://www.winespectator.com/ (the "Website") and watched pre-recorded video content through the Wine Spectator Website. Levi &Korsinsky, LLP's investigation indicates that legally protected data may have been unlawfully intercepted during visits to the Wine Spectator Website, particularly affecting customers who subscribed and watched pre-recorded video content on the Wine Spectator Website.

WHAT'S THIS ABOUT?

If you subscribed to the Wine Spectator Website, through an email newsletter, digital, or paid subscription, and watched videos on the platform, your legally protected data may have been intercepted without your knowledge. If your data was compromised, you may be entitled to compensation.

AM I ENTITLED TO COMPENSATION?

If your data was compromised, you may be entitled to compensation. Unauthorized data interception is a serious issue that could lead to privacy violations, potentially leading to significant breaches of your personal information. If the company entrusted with securing your data has failed in this duty, they may be held accountable for any exposure of your information, potentially exposing you to risks such as misuse or unauthorized use of your data.

HOW DO I KNOW IF I WAS AFFECTED?

If you subscribed to Wine Spectator Website and subsequently watched pre-recorded video materials, your data may have been intercepted. Follow the link below to find out if you have a claim.

Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating whether affected customers are entitled to compensation. There is no cost to participate. Follow the link below to find out:

https://tinyurl.com/ypbvhnrd

data.title: INVESTIGATION ALERT: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP Announces Investigation of Numotion Data Breach
data.description:
NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / April 4, 2025 / United Seating and Mobility, LLC which does business as Numotion, recently disclosed that it suffered a data breach that compromised the sensitive personal and protected health data of individuals. This data breach has led to concerns over the security of sensitive personal and protected health information entrusted to Numotion.

WHAT'S THIS ABOUT?

On January 22, 2025, Numotion became aware of a security incident involving unauthorized access to certain employee email accounts. Upon detection, Numotion launched an investigation with the assistance of third-party cybersecurity experts to determine the nature and scope of the incident. The investigation determined that an unauthorized third party gained access to email accounts on several occasions between September 2, 2024, and November 18, 2024. Numotion conducted a comprehensive review of the impacted emails to determine what information was compromised and identified affected individuals.

Upon information and belief, the following types of sensitive personal and protected health information may have been compromised:name, date of birth, product information, payment and financial account information, health insurance information, medical information, Social Security number (for a minority of individuals), and driver's license number (for a minority of individuals).On March 7, 2025, Numotion filed a notice with the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services Office for Civil Rights (OCR) and started sending out notice letters to the impacted individuals.Compensation may be available for those individuals who received notice that their personal information was compromised.

WHY YOU MAY BE ENTITLED TO COMPENSATION?

Data breaches are serious matters that can cause long-term damage. Hackers may use stolen information to commit identity theft, financial fraud, or other crimes. Companies that fail to secure your personal data may be held liable for the resulting harm.

HOW DO I KNOW IF I WAS AFFECTED?

If you received a data breach notification letter from Numotion, you are likely affected. Follow the link below to find out if you may be eligible for compensation.

Levi Korsinsky, LLP is investigating whether affected individuals are entitled to compensation. If you have received a notice about the data breach, you may be entitled to compensation. There is no cost or obligation to participate. Follow the link below to find out:

https://tinyurl.com/5ef6e7ue

Losses were driven by Deutsche Bank (-9.77%), MTU Aero Engines AG (-8.40%) and Infineon (-7.26%).
